name: Ball Boys
detailed_description:
Ball Boys is an online ball-racing championship where you play as a customizable ball and try to score the most points in various parkour challenges. You can roll, double-jump, dash, and maneuver in the air to try and navigate your way through various scenarios.

Key Features:
  • Procedurally-generated tracks, so every parkour is unique.
  • Public and Private games with up to 10 players.
  • 20 values of RGB customization for each trail and ball.
  • The soundtrack of Ball Boys is shuffled for added variety.

After each championship concludes, players will be given coins based on their performance. These coins can be spent on customizations for their balls such as skins, trails, and hats. Everyone in-game will be able to see your swag, so make sure you choose wisely.

reviews.review_text:
Ball Boys. What a rush. I started as a bumbling amateur, in line with my base skill as a platformer. But as I zipped off the starting line of my second series, my skill had grown so far beyond my expectations. I bounced from cloud to cloud without any fear, being rewarded oh so greatly when I stuck my landings. In the next parkour challenge I instead took my time, making use of the green checkpoints along the way. 

I have no idea how many different stages there are, but I don't think I played any two of the same. Even if I did, the props dotting your path make it so no two runs will ever feel the same. One run, you might have trouble with a hotdog; another, it might be its cheeseburger neighbor (you'll get it, trust me). I also really enjoyed the ability to change the skybox at any time, just a cool detail. Also the music, 10/10 tunes.

I saw that there's cosmetics for your ball, but didn't get the chance to check it out. Looks like I'll be a Ball Boy grandmaster when I earn the chance to show it. While I also didn't get the chance to make use of it's 10 player multiplayer, all of my positive experience came from playing as a happy, singular Ball Boy that only wished there was a sudden death mode for that one time I came so close to greatness only to be stopped by the buzzer. In short: 10/10 experience, join the Ball Boys!

Ball Boys is a very fun game. Controls can be a bit wonky and wobbly at first, but once you get the hang of it, Ball Boys is an experience as smooth as the spherical objects you play as. The music is also fantastic and I'd like to personally shake hands with the people who created the OST.
Game has a lot of potential, the basic mechanics and customized orbs keep you entertained and a nice indie-play with a lobby of friends.

Versatile gameplay and a great world building experience. Input buffer could be a bit better but the game is overall engaging and not too laggy. I would rather sound with a 4000 degree pipe cleaner 9/10 would play again.
Wonderful game. Great for yapping in a Discord call or locking in and getting new balls! Love the music as well.
